case.title: MCMASTER v. NEW YORK LIFE INS CO

opinion.h1: MCMASTER v. NEW YORK LIFE INS CO, 176 U.S. 685 (1900)
opinion.h2: FRED A. MCMASTER, Administrator, etc., Petitioner, v. NEW YORK LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY. No. 523.
Supreme Court of the United States

f.p: See 40 C. C. A. 119, 99 Fed. Rep. 856.~
